name: Blue Corn Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Blue corn meal (as used for)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, mix melted butter with egg yolks. Add 1/4 cup of melted butter to the mixture.
3. Pour the liquid ingredients into the dry mixture and stir until well moistened.
4. Whip egg whites until they hold stiff peaks. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
5. Preheat a waffle iron to medium high heat (375°F). Brush the grids with melted butter.
6. Fill each grid about halfway with batter, spreading it slightly.
7. Close the waffle iron and bake for 5 to 6 minutes, or until the waffles are golden brown.
8. Serve hot with butter and syrup. Makes about 4 waffles.
